zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Beaumont於大約1363年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont24歲，母親Margaret de Vere29歲。她於1377年與Richard de Moleyns在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1380年2月14日在英國巴金哈姆爾享年18歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Beaumont于大约1363年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont24岁，母亲Margaret de Vere29岁。她于1377年与Richard de Moleyns在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1380年2月14日在英国巴金哈姆爾享年18岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Elinor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Beaumont was born about 1363, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont, was 24 and her mother, Margaret de Vere, was 29. She married Richard de Moleyns in 1377, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 14 February 1380, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 18.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Beaumont est née environ 1363, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Vere, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Moleyns en 1377, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 14 février 1380, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 18 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Beaumont um 1363 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont 24 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Vere 29. Sie hat 1377 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Richard de Moleyns geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 14. Februar 1380 im Alter von 18 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Beaumont è nata il circa 1363 nel Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Vere, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Moleyns nel 1377, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 febbraio 1380, nel Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 18 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Beaumontが約1363年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumontは24歳，母Margaret de Vereは29歳であった。1377年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでRichard de Moleynsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1380年2月14日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで18歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Beaumont(이)가 대략 1363년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Vere(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Richard de Moleyns(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 2월 14일 영국 벅잉함실르에서 18세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1363, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Vere, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Moleyns em 1377, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1380, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 18 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Beaumont родилась около 1363 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Vere, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Moleyns в 1377 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 14 февраля 1380 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 18 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1363, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret de Vere, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Richard de Moleyns en 1377, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1380, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 18 años.
